title: Glowing Smoky Light Norwegian Veal Bowl
description: Quick and delicious Norwegian-inspired veal bowl with a smoky lacquer-glaze, served in a dolsot stone bowl. This dish is perfect for a weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: Lacquer-glaze
ingredients.notes: make your own using 1 tbsp soy sauce, 1 tbsp honey, 1 tsp rice vinegar

instructions: Heat your dolsot stone bowl in a 400°F oven for 10 minutes.
Season the veal cutlets with salt and pepper.
Sear the veal in the avocado oil for 2-3 minutes per side.
Transfer the veal to the preheated dolsot stone bowl and set aside.
In the same pan, cook the garlic and ginger for 1 minute.
Add the lacquer-glaze to the pan and stir to combine.
Simmer the lacquer-glaze for 2-3 minutes or until it thickens slightly.
Stir in the smoked paprika and cook for an additional minute.
Top the veal with the lacquer-glaze mixture and garnish with parsley and dill.
